# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/envoy.log"
  address:
    socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 8001 }

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 8000 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        config:
          route_config:
            name: service_routes
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: services
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
                - match: { prefix: "/api/v1" }
                  route: { cluster: backends }
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
  clusters:
    - name: backends
      type: STRICT_DNS
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: backends
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address: { address: "localhost", port_value: 8080 }
                max_streams: 10
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
        - priority: default
          max_connections: 500
          max_pending_requests: 100
          max_requests: 200
      health_check_interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
